title: glechoma persica
intro: Glechoma persica, also known as Persian speedwell, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Glechoma persica include its ability to improve digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
